intended_use: AI-Rad Companion (Cardiovascular) is image processing software that provides quantitative and qualitative analysis from previously acquired Computed Tomography DICOM images to support radiologists and
intended_use_full: AI-Rad Companion (Cardiovascular) is image processing software that provides quantitative and qualitative analysis from previously acquired Computed Tomography DICOM images to support radiologists and physicians from emergency medicine, specialty care, urgent care, and general practice in the evaluation and assessment of cardiovascular diseases.
target_condition: cardiovascular diseases, including aortic dilation/aneurysm and coronary artery calcium
ground_truth: Manual annotations by expert readers for segmentation; inter-reader variability assessment for diameter measurements
other_metrics: Aorta segmentation: DICE coefficient 0.924 (± 0.046) for subject device vs. 0.910 (± 0.066) for predicate device. Aorta diameter measurements at nine predefined locations: bias ±1.5 mm (95%-CI: [0.9 mm, 2.0 mm]), MAE ≤2.2 mm (95%-CI: [1.8 mm, 2.6 mm]). Maximum ascending/descending aorta diameter measurements: 91.9% within limits of agreement (±3.51 mm), bias ±1.5 mm (95%-CI: [1.2 mm, 1.8 mm]), MAE ≤1.8 mm (95%-CI: [1.44 mm, 2.23 mm]).
